summary: Iteration 123 - Code Quality Fixes Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed. Verified all code quality fixes: (1) _get_current_user_for_sessions helper added to routes_auth_email.py - GET/DELETE /api/user/sessions now work, (2) No __import__ calls in routes/, (3) routes/__init__.py uses 120+ explicit imports instead of wildcards, (4) now_iso imports verified in 12 route files, (5) Wiki page creation works with workspace_id parameter (ws_id bug fixed), (6) Static imports verified in routes_scim.py, routes_nexus_browser.py, routes_mfa.py, routes_agent_training.py.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_auth_email.py: _get_current_user_for_sessions helper correctly resolves user from session token for session management endpoints
routes/__init__.py: All 120+ route registration functions now use explicit imports instead of wildcards
No __import__() dynamic imports found in any route files - all replaced with static imports
routes_wiki.py: Uses workspace_id parameter correctly in all endpoint definitions
CSRF middleware properly handles Bearer token auth - skips CSRF when no csrf_token cookie present
context_for_next_testing_agent: All code quality fixes verified. Key endpoints tested: /api/health (200), /api/user/sessions (returns session list), DELETE /api/user/sessions/{id} (works), /api/support/tickets with org_id (200), /api/platform/capabilities (returns features), POST /api/workspaces/{id}/wiki (creates page with workspace_id). Code review confirmed: no __import__ calls, explicit imports in __init__.py, _get_current_user_for_sessions helper exists, workspace_id used correctly in wiki routes.

fixes_verified.wiki_ws_id_undefined: VERIFIED - routes_wiki.py uses workspace_id parameter correctly
fixes_verified.now_iso_imports: VERIFIED - All 12 route files have proper now_iso imports from nexus_utils
fixes_verified.identity_comparisons: VERIFIED - routes_ai_keys.py uses == True/== False instead of is True/is False
